description.en: Brief overview of your role and team context.

en: Built and maintained RESTful APIs serving 10k+ daily requests
Reduced page load time by 40% through frontend optimization
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile sprints
zh: 開發及維護 RESTful API，每日處理 10k+ 請求
透過前端優化將頁面載入時間減少 40%
在 Agile Sprint 中與跨職能團隊協作

description.en: Supported internal IT systems and assisted with software deployment.
description.zh: 支援內部 IT 系統及協助軟件部署。

en: Automated routine reporting tasks with Python scripts
Documented troubleshooting procedures for the team wiki
zh: 以 Python 腳本自動化日常報告工作
為團隊 Wiki 撰寫故障排除文件
